title: linaria genistifolia subsp. praealta
intro: Linaria genistifolia subsp. praealta, also known as Butter and Eggs or Large Toadflax, is a flowering plant species of the genus Linaria. It is a perennial herb that has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Linaria genistifolia subsp. praealta include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
